mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMP_CD, FROM_USR_ID, FROM_USR_NM, TO_USR_ID, TO_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, REMARK, USE_YN, REG_ID FROM AP_DELEGATE WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND FROM_USR_ID=#{fromUsrId} AND TO_USR_ID=#{toUsrId} ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT ID, COMP_CD, FROM_USR_ID, FROM_USR_NM, TO_USR_ID, TO_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, REMARK, USE_YN, REG_ID FROM AP_DELEGATE WHERE ID=#{id} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AP_DELEGATE (COMP_CD, FROM_USR_ID, FROM_USR_NM, TO_USR_ID, TO_USR_NM, VALID_SD, VALID_ED, REMARK, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{fromUsrId}, #{fromUsrNm}, #{toUsrId}, #{toUsrNm}, TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remark}, NVL(#{useYn},'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE AP_DELEGATE SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
